A person was born at 10 Gh. 58 Vigh after sunrise. The
Vighati divided by 225 gives a remainder of208. This places
the native in the male birth group. This is correct. As per the
exact time of birth of another, the Vighatis after sun rise are
1242. The remainder is 117 which falls within the female
group. Have to deduct 27 Vighatis or add 34 Vighatis to the
time ofbirthjust to prove this theory?

14 Rectification ofB irth Time
A male child was born at 28gb. 25 vgh. The Vighatis are
1705. Divided by 225 the remainder is 130 in the female
group. Are we to add 21 Vighatis or deduct 40 Vighatis from
the birth time. This is preponterous. One possible way out is to
divide the remainder by 75 to get three groups. Then the
Vighatis 0 to 15, 31 to 45, 61 to 75 should indicate male birth,
and the rest a female birth.
